summary: Gruber announces the release of SmartyPants 1.4, his typographic punctuation plugin. The update contains no new features but includes numerous small improvements, particularly better parsing of HTML comments and PHP code blocks. He also notes a correction: the initial zip archive was botched and asks early downloaders to re-download.
key_points: SmartyPants 1.4 released with incremental improvements rather than new features
Improved parsing support for HTML comments and PHP code blocks
Initial release had a botched zip archive that was quickly corrected
money_quotes: No new features, but lots of small improvements, including much better support for parsing HTML comments and PHP code blocks.
key_insight: A brief release announcement for SmartyPants 1.4, reflecting Gruber's ongoing commitment to refining his typographic tools through incremental quality improvements.
